title: acalypha marginata
intro: Acalypha marginata, also known as the red calumba or African calumba, is a plant species belonging to the family Euphorbiaceae, native to tropical Africa. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiviral activities. The health benefits of Acalypha marginata include its potential to treat various ailments, such as fever, rheumatism, and gastrointestinal issues, as well as its ability to boost the immune system and reduce oxidative stress. Acalypha marginata is often prepared as a decoction, infusion, or tincture for its herbal remedies, which can be used to treat a range of health conditions.
